eventbrite.name: Eventbrite
eventbrite.fee_note: Eventbrite fees: 6.95% + £0.59 per ticket (includes payment processing). Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p).

bookitbee.name: BookitBee
bookitbee.fee_note: BookitBee fees: from 3.5% per ticket (up to 6.5% for advanced features), min £1, max £19.95 cap, plus Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Source: bookitbee.com/pricing (March 2026).

ticketmaster.name: Ticketmaster
ticketmaster.fee_note: Ticketmaster fees vary by event and venue - this estimate uses approximately 10% + £2.50 per ticket (bundled). Actual fees may be higher or lower. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p).

hi_events.name: Hi.Events
hi_events.fee_note: Hi.Events cloud fees: 0.75% + ~32p per ticket, plus Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Self-hosted Hi.Events has no platform fees, only Stripe processing. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p).

hi_events_selfhosted.name: Hi.Events Self-Hosted
hi_events_selfhosted.fee_note: Hi.Events Single Domain commercial license: $499 (approx. £420). AGPL edition is free but requires 'Powered by Hi.Events' branding. Multi-tenant licenses available at higher tiers - contact Hi.Events for pricing. Chobble Tickets self-hosted: free, no license fee + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Source: hi.events/pricing and hi.events/open-source-event-ticketing (March 2026).

pretix_hosted.name: Pretix Hosted
pretix_hosted.fee_note: Pretix Hosted fees: 2.5% of ticket price excl. taxes (capped at €15/ticket, approx. £13). Payment provider fees (e.g. Stripe 1.5% + 20p, PayPal, or Mollie) are charged separately on top. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p).

pretix_selfhosted.name: Pretix Enterprise
pretix_selfhosted.fee_note: Pretix Enterprise Starter license: €499/year (approx. £420). Community edition is free but lacks proprietary plugins. Chobble Tickets self-hosted: free, no license fee + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p).

fatsoma.name: Fatsoma
fatsoma.fee_note: Fatsoma fees: 10% per ticket (minimum £1), plus Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Source: ticketing.fatsoma.com/pricing (March 2026).

resident_advisor.name: Resident Advisor
resident_advisor.fee_note: Resident Advisor fees: approximately 10% per ticket (includes payment processing). RA does not publicly list exact fees - they are negotiated with promoters. The 10% figure is widely cited by third-party comparison sites. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Sources: weticket.com, support.ra.co (March 2026).

dice.name: DICE
dice.fee_note: DICE fees are negotiated per partnership and not publicly disclosed. This estimate uses approximately 10% per ticket (bundled, including payment processing). Actual fees may vary. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p).

pta_events.name: PTA Events
pta_events.fee_note: PTA Events Starter plan fees: 3.95% per transaction + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Premium plan (£299.99+VAT/year) reduces platform fee to 1.5%. Fees can be passed to buyers. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat (£25 for community groups) + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Source: ptaevents.freshdesk.com (March 2026).

eventim_light.name: EVENTIM.Light
eventim_light.fee_note: EVENTIM.Light fees: 8% per ticket (includes payment processing). Fee can be passed to ticket buyers or absorbed by the organiser. No fixed costs or binding contracts. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Source: eventim-light.co.uk/pricing (March 2026).

ticketek.name: Ticketek
ticketek.fee_note: Ticketek fees vary by event and venue - this estimate uses approximately AU$8 per transaction (converted to GBP) as a typical service and handling fee. Actual fees may be higher or lower. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p).

tito.name: Tito
tito.fee_note: Tito fees: 3% per ticket (2.5% for charity/non-profit/community), capped at €25 per ticket. Payment processing (e.g. Stripe 1.5% + 20p) is separate. Free events have no fees. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Source: ti.to/pricing (March 2026).

ticket_tailor.name: Ticket Tailor
ticket_tailor.fee_note: Ticket Tailor pay-as-you-go fee: £0.60 per paid ticket (flat, no percentage). Prepaid credits reduce this to as little as £0.22 per ticket in bulk (500 credits = £0.41 each; minimum purchase 100 credits). Registered charities get 50% off; PTAs and B Corps get 20% off. Free events are free up to 5,000 tickets per year. Payment processing via Stripe (1.5% + 20p), PayPal, or Square is charged separately. Custom domain is £7/month extra, or free when bundled with white-label. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Source: tickettailor.com/pricing (April 2026).

cheddar_up.name: Cheddar Up
cheddar_up.fee_note: Cheddar Up Team plan: $420/year (approx. £335) required for ticketing with QR codes. Convenience fees: 3.59% + $0.59 (approx. 47p) per transaction (includes payment processing via Stripe). Fees can be passed to payers or absorbed by the organiser. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Source: cheddarup.com/pricing (March 2026).

signupgenius.name: SignUpGenius (+ ads)
signupgenius.fee_note: SignUpGenius Tickets fees: $0.25 (approx. 20p) per ticket, plus Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Payment collection on standard sign-ups is charged separately at 5% + $0.50 per transaction. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Source: signupgenius.com/pricing (March 2026).

wix_events.name: Wix Events
wix_events.fee_note: Wix Events fees: 2.5% ticket service fee per paid ticket, plus Wix Payments processing (2.1% + 20p in the UK). Requires a Wix Business & eCommerce plan (from $29/month, approx. £23/month or £276/year). Free tickets have no service fee. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Source: support.wix.com (March 2026).

fixr.name: FIXR (Pro)
fixr.fee_note: FIXR Pro fees: 4.99% + £0.49 per ticket (£1 minimum) + VAT (includes payment processing). Student & Charity tier: 3.99% + £0.49. Fees are typically paid by the ticket buyer but can be absorbed by the organiser. Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Source: fixr.co/pricing (March 2026).

fooevents.name: FooEvents (Basic Bundle)
fooevents.fee_note: FooEvents Basic Bundle: $139/year (approx. £110) for the plugin subscription, which includes 12 months of support and updates. Premium Bundle: $199 (approx. £160). Bookings Bundle: $169 (approx. £135). Point of Sale Bundle: $349 (approx. £275). No per-ticket fees. Payment processing is handled by your own WooCommerce payment gateway (e.g. Stripe 1.5% + 20p in the UK). Running FooEvents also requires a WordPress + WooCommerce site, which has its own hosting costs (typically £5-£25/month). Chobble Tickets: £50/year flat + Stripe processing (1.5% + 20p). Source: fooevents.com/pricing (April 2026).
